tagline: Buffalo's Premier Swimming Pool Service & Maintenance Provider

hero.headline: Your Pool, Perfectly Maintained Every Single Week
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax, not to spend your weekends wrestling with chemicals and equipment. 716 Pool Service handles everything so your only job is to enjoy the water. Trusted by 64+ families across Western New York.

about.label: Why WNY Trusts 716 Pool Service
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Community-Driven Pool Care
about.description: Founded by Matt Duve right here in Clarence, 716 Pool Service has grown through word-of-mouth and a simple promise: treat every pool like it is our own. With over ten years of combined experience and a perfect 5-star rating from 64 families, we are proud to be Western New York's go-to pool service team. No corporate call centers, no rotating strangers in your backyard — just a dedicated local crew that knows your pool by name.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Matt personally oversees every project. You are never handed off to subcontractors or random technicians — the owner is always involved.

features.title: No Contracts. Ever.
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no fine print. Period.

features.title: Perfect 5-Star Track Record
features.description: 64 reviews and every single one is five stars. That is not luck — that is what happens when a team genuinely cares about doing the job right.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> Opening to Closing Day
services.subtitle: From the first warm day of spring to the last leaf of fall, we keep your pool in perfect shape so you never have to worry about a thing.

cards.title: Pool Openings
cards.description: Complete spring opening including safety cover removal, dewinterizing equipment, deck blowing, vacuuming with a trash pump, full brushing, and shocking your pool to crystal-clear perfection.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly service: water testing, chemical balancing, vacuuming, skimming, brushing, and full equipment checks so you enjoy a worry-free swimming season all summer.

cards.title: Pool Closings
cards.description: Professional winterization including blowing out lines, winterizing all equipment, adding winter chemicals, and securely installing your safety cover to protect against harsh WNY winters.

cards.title: Equipment Installation & Repair
cards.description: Expert removal and installation of pumps, filters, and heaters. Whether it is a full upgrade or a quick fix, our technicians get your systems running at peak performance.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Thorough inspections assessing your pool, equipment, and surrounding structures. Perfect for new homeowners, pre-season evaluations, or catching issues before they become costly repairs.

cards.title: Spring Deep Cleaning
cards.description: Intensive cleaning for pools that need extra attention after the off-season. Includes deep vacuuming, surface brushing, debris removal, and chemical balancing to restore pristine condition.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Swim-Ready Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Give us a call or fill out the form. We will provide an honest, no-pressure quote within 24 hours. No contracts, no commitments, just straightforward pricing.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Matt and the crew arrive on schedule, fully equipped to handle everything from chemical balancing to equipment checks. Owner-operated means hands-on quality every visit.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, swim-ready, and worry-free all season long. If anything is not right, we come back and fix it at no extra charge.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get a custom quote based on your pool. No hidden fees, no contracts — just honest pricing from a local team that values your trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will come back to make it right — absolutely free. No questions asked, no hoops to jump through. Your pool should make you happy, and we will not stop until it does.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within a few days. For urgent pool issues or green pool emergencies, we do our best to offer same-week response. Give us a call and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients simply give us gate access and we take care of everything. You will know exactly what was done each visit, and we are always just a text or call away if you have questions.

faqs.question: What areas do you service in Western New York?
faqs.answer: We serve Clarence, Buffalo, and the entire greater WNY area including Amherst, Williamsville, East Aurora, Orchard Park, Hamburg, Lancaster, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: Do you require long-term contracts?
faqs.answer: Never. We believe in earning your business every visit. No contracts, no cancellation fees, no commitments. You can adjust or cancel your service anytime with zero hassle.

faqs.question: Can you service any type of pool?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We work with all pool types — in-ground, above-ground, vinyl liner, fiberglass, concrete, and saltwater systems. Whatever you have, our experienced team has serviced it.

testimonials.name: Jennifer J.
testimonials.text: Communication was excellent, they were responsive, professional, and easy to work with throughout the entire process. After the opening, we had a minor issue with some equipment, and the owner personally stopped by to help us get everything up and running again.

testimonials.name: John W.
testimonials.text: Matt and the team at 716 Pool Service are excellent. We used their service for a spring cleaning and the pool is spotless. What usually would have taken more than a full weekend of repeated vacuuming was complete in no time.

testimonials.name: Bernadette R.
testimonials.text: Very satisfied with 716 Pool Services. Matt and his crew are very thorough, dependable and professional. Pool is consistently well maintained. Highly recommend to anyone in Western New York.

benefits: Free pool inspection with every quote
